scripts.dev:api: npm run build -w packages/db && npm run dev -w backend-api
scripts.dev:worker: npm run build -w packages/db && npm run dev -w worker-service
scripts.build:api: npm run build -w packages/db && npm run build -w backend-api
scripts.build:worker: npm run build -w packages/db && npm run build -w worker-service
scripts.test: npm run build -w packages/db && npm run test -w backend-api && npm run test -w worker-service
